currentPosition.summary: The team is actively engaged in testing on silicon, with multiple tasks designated as 'in progress' in this crucial stage.

tasks.name: N3: [QS127M Bench] Baseband schedule bidirectional test.
tasks.detail: Validating TX and RX bidirectional functionality of QS127M in loopback mode for 1 million packets.

tasks.name: QS223 FPGA
tasks.detail: FPGA-related tasks for QS223, with discussions on due date adjustments.

tasks.name: MIPI EXPLORATION
tasks.detail: Exploring MIPI functionality with subtasks and discussions on layout and due dates.

tasks.name: QS223 top level RTL Simulation
tasks.detail: Top level RTL simulation for QS223, dependent on analog specs and with unclarified subtasks.

tasks.name: N3: [QS127M Bench] PER with FG test with AGC with ECC + CRC.
tasks.detail: Calculating Packet Error Rate (PER) for all modes of QS127M and plotting PMDR plots.

tasks.name: N3: [QS127M Bench] PER with FG test with AGC without ecc +crc
tasks.detail: Performing PER tests with FG and AGC, without ECC and CRC.

tasks.name: N3 : [QS127M-ATE] ATE test plan review.
tasks.detail: Reviewing and approving the ATE test plan with Tessolve for QS127M production.

tasks.name: QS221 SILICON DEBUG
tasks.detail: Silicon debug tasks for QS221, with an overdue due date.

tasks.name: RX FE+RX BE VALIDATION- amp sweep, freq offset and interference and digital rssi measurement
tasks.detail: Validation of RX FE+RX BE including amp sweep, freq offset, interference, and digital RSSI measurement.

tasks.name: N3: Top level BER simulation
tasks.detail: Top-level BER simulation to check backend and frontend functionality across different settings, facing simulation time constraints and debugging needs.

tasks.name: N3: [FW] QS222_BRING_UP_FW_TASK
tasks.detail: Bring-up firmware tasks for QS222, with requests for task details and due date updates.

blockers.reason: The due date of 2/14/2025 has passed, indicating a potential delay or lack of progress.
Simulation time is a constraint (6 hours per sim) and debugging is noted as a potential issue.
Dependency on analog specification not being clearly conveyed.  May require rescheduling.

nextStep: The team needs to continue and complete the ongoing 'Testing on silicon' tasks and then prepare for the results review with the Design/Architect team.
